title: dorcoceras philippense
intro: Dorcoceras philippense, also known as the Philippine Dorcoceras or Philippine Dorcas, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Rutaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as improving digestion and reducing pain. In traditional herbal preparations, Dorcoceras philippense is often used in infusions, decoctions, and ointments to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
